---
title: "lncRNA blast update"
author: "Jill Ashey"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

BLAST update for shared and unique lncRNA sequences using lncRNAs filtered for expression. 

BLAST was run on Unity 
```{bash}
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#SBATCH --export=NONE
#SBATCH --nodes=1 
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=1
#SBATCH --cpus-per-task=8
#SBATCH --partition=uri-cpu
#SBATCH --mem=200GB
#SBATCH -t 100:00:00
#SBATCH -o slurm-%j.out
#SBATCH -e slurm-%j.error
#SBATCH -D /scratch3/workspace/jillashey_uri_edu-e5_deepdive

module load uri/main all/BLAST+/2.13.0-gompi-2022a

echo "make blast dbs" $(date)
makeblastdb -in apul/apul_final_lncRNAs.fasta -dbtype nucl -out Apul_lncRNA
makeblastdb -in peve/peve_final_lncRNAs.fasta -dbtype nucl -out Peve_lncRNA
makeblastdb -in ptua/pmea_final_lncRNAs.fasta -dbtype nucl -out Pmea_lncRNA

echo "Apul v Peve" $(date)
blastn -query apul/apul_final_lncRNAs.fasta \
       -db Peve_lncRNA \
       -outfmt "6 qseqid sseqid pident length evalue" \
       -evalue 1e-40 \
       -max_target_seqs 1 \
       -out apul_vs_peve.tab
       
echo "Apul v Pmea" $(date)
blastn -query apul/apul_final_lncRNAs.fasta \
       -db Pmea_lncRNA \
       -outfmt "6 qseqid sseqid pident length evalue" \
       -evalue 1e-40 \
       -max_target_seqs 1 \
       -out apul_vs_pmea.tab
       
echo "Peve v Pmea" $(date)
blastn -query peve/peve_final_lncRNAs.fasta \
       -db Pmea_lncRNA \
       -outfmt "6 qseqid sseqid pident length evalue" \
       -evalue 1e-40 \
       -max_target_seqs 1 \
       -out peve_vs_pmea.tab
```

Look at BLAST output
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Load BLAST results (just the query and subject columns)
apul_peve <- read.table("../output/22-lncRNA-comparative-blast/apul_vs_peve.tab")[,1:2]
apul_pmea <- read.table("../output/22-lncRNA-comparative-blast/apul_vs_pmea.tab")[,1:2]
peve_pmea <- read.table("../output/22-lncRNA-comparative-blast/peve_vs_pmea.tab")[,1:2]

# Identify shared IDs
# Note: Use unique() because one lncRNA might hit multiple targets
shared_apul_peve <- unique(apul_peve$V1)
shared_apul_pmea <- unique(apul_pmea$V1)
shared_peve_pmea <- unique(peve_pmea$V1)

# Find the 3-way intersection (Shared by all three)
# This finds IDs in Apul that have hits in BOTH Peve and Pmea
shared_all <- intersect(shared_apul_peve, shared_apul_pmea)
```

8 lncRNAs shared across all three spp. 

APUL: 6798
PEVE: 2812
PTUA: 4924

Look at shared and unique 
```{r}
# Total unique pool size
total_lncs <- 6798+2812+4924

# Counts 
n_all <- length(shared_all)
n_apul_peve_only <- length(setdiff(shared_apul_peve, shared_all))
n_apul_pmea_only <- length(setdiff(shared_apul_pmea, shared_all))
n_peve_pmea_only <- length(setdiff(shared_peve_pmea, shared_all))

# Unique to each (Total - any shared)
unique_apul <- 6798 - length(union(shared_apul_peve, shared_apul_pmea))
unique_peve <- 2812 - length(union(shared_apul_peve, shared_peve_pmea))
unique_pmea <- 4924 - length(union(shared_peve_pmea, shared_apul_pmea))

## Calculate percentages 
# Denominator
total_lncs <- 6798 + 2812 + 4924

# Percentage Shared by All Three
p_all <- (n_all / total_lncs) * 100

# Percentage Unique to each species
p_unique_apul <- (unique_apul / total_lncs) * 100
p_unique_peve <- (unique_peve / total_lncs) * 100
p_unique_pmea <- (unique_pmea / total_lncs) * 100

# Percentage Shared between pairs (not including 'all')
# This reflects "A. pulchra shared X with P. evermanni"
p_apul_peve <- (length(shared_apul_peve) / total_lncs) * 100
p_apul_pmea <- (length(shared_apul_pmea) / total_lncs) * 100
p_peve_pmea <- (length(shared_peve_pmea) / total_lncs) * 100
```
